name: GlaxoSmithKline — Patent Pool (inside-out open innovation)
description: The flagship inside-out case from BMG Pattern No. 5. Two BMCs — traditional Big Pharma archetype (blockbuster-drug economics, neglected-disease IP idle) and the patent-pool variant (idle IP opened to external researchers under license; reputation + access dividend) — that together show how the BMC's Revenue Streams, Customer Segments, and Key Partners blocks rewrite when a large pharma firm switches idle IP from a defensive moat into a small but real outside revenue stream.
